title: Miskolc Heat Wave
lead: A critical heat wave is affecting Miskolc with a Z-Score of +3.23. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures.
body:
The current heat wave in Miskolc has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10. 
 The temperature anomaly is significantly high, with a Z-Score of +3.23, indicating a rare and extreme event. 
 The low humidity of 13% and moderate wind speed of 12.6 km/h are exacerbating the heat wave conditions.
conclusion: Implement immediate heat wave mitigation measures to ensure public safety.
